prompt: Build a design brief for adding a small repo-local Python command.
required_checks: load the software reference sections needed for Build mode
load the Python extension when project signals match
state boundaries, dependency direction, state ownership, rejected abstractions, and validation
forbidden_behaviors: duplicate security or test-quality specialist workflows
grader: rubric: design brief changes implementation decisions and delegates out-of-scope specialist concerns
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Review a shell script refactor for design quality.
required_checks: load the shell-script extension when signals match
cite SD or extension smell codes
include verification-layer tags and smallest useful correction
forbidden_behaviors: treat style-only preferences as design blockers
skip mandatory extension validation when available
grader: rubric: findings are evidence-backed design issues with calibrated severity and extension context
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Extract the current software design baseline from an existing module before planning changes.
required_checks: inspect existing code structure before recommendations
identify coupling hotspots and semantic drift
forbidden_behaviors: rewrite specialist API, UI, security, or test-quality guidance
grader: rubric: baseline reflects current repo evidence and produces a bounded next move
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text
